title: No limit on directory subscription count per client
description: The subscribeDirectory handler allows a client to subscribe to an unlimited number of directories. The subscription data is stored in subscribedRealPathsByClient and subscribedVirtualPathsByClient dictionaries. A malicious client could subscribe to thousands of directories, consuming server memory. Each notification (notifyDirectoryChanged/notifyDirectoryDeleted) iterates over all subscriptions for all clients, so a large number of subscriptions also impacts notification performance.
recommendation: Add a configurable maximum subscription count per client (e.g. 100). Reject subscriptions beyond the limit with an appropriate error.
